message:
🌱 Add kuberay: [Feature] Support managedBy for integration with MultiKueue mission (#1345)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kuberay-2544-feature-support-managedby-for-integration-with-multikueue",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kuberay: [Feature] Support managedBy for integration with MultiKueue",
+    "description": "[Feature] Support managedBy for integration with MultiKueue. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kuberay deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kuberay version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay\nhelm list -n kuberay 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working kuberay installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kuberay configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kuberay configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay\nkubectl get configmap -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kuberay\n```\nThe support for the managedBy field which can delegate reconciliation from built-in controller, to a custom one."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] Support managedBy for integration with MultiKueue",
+        "description": "## Why are these changes needed?\nAs stated in https://github.com/ray-project/kuberay/issues/2544.\nIt allows for integration with [MultiKueue](https://kueue.sigs.k8s.io/docs/tasks/manage/setup_multikueue/) (multi-cluster Kueue), in specific it provides:\n* simpler installation, otherwise only installation of RayJob CRDs is required\n* support for mixed setup in one cluster - some RayJobs could be run by MultiKueue and some by the default operator\n\n## Related issue number\nRelates to #2544 \n\n##\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n kuberay -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kuberay\nkubectl get events -n kuberay --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[Feature] Support managedBy for integration with MultiKueue\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Why are these changes needed?\nAs stated in https://github.com/ray-project/kuberay/issues/2544.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+      "kuberay",
+      "community",

+    ],
